---
title: "Vedika Shirtekar"
#subtitle: "Climate Tech & Sustainability"
toc: false
image: "Vedika_cropped.png"
about: 
  template: trestles 
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 20em
  links: 
    - text: LinkedIn
      icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vedika-shirtekar-b2814b201
    - text: GitHub
      icon: github 
      href: https://github.com/vedikaS-byte
---

<h1 class="typing">
Hello World <img src="images/earth-logo.png" alt="Earth Logo" class="earth-logo"/>
</h1>

<div class="accent-rule"></div>

::: marquee-text-right
### Welcome to my website! 

I'm a data analyst working at the intersection of climate and data. I build tools and workflows that strengthen emissions accounting and help organizations understand their greenhouse gas footprint. 
 
[View my work](post.qmd){.btn-cta} [Get in touch](mailto:vedika.shirtekar@gmail.com){.btn-outline}

:::

<div class="accent-rule"></div>

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Education

**Master of Environmental Data Science** (June 2026) | UC Santa Barbara  
Bren School of Environmental Science & Management

**B.S. Environmental Science** (August 2021 - May 2025) | University of Texas at Austin

## Professional Experience

**Emissions Data Associate** | Bright Sky Environmental | Austin, TX | 2026–  
Supporting client greenhouse gas calculations and building structured 
reporting and data management workflows.

**Climate Data Analyst** | University of Texas at Austin | 2023–2024  
Developed a Scope 1-3 GHG inventory using SIMAP in accordance with the 
GHG Protocol, and presented six emissions reduction strategies to the 
Dean of the College of Fine Arts.

**Data Analytics Research Assistant** | University of Texas at Austin | 2024  
Principal component analysis and thematic coding of university survey data.
:::
